item.title: Morning Briefing — July 06, 2026
item.description:
Good morning, and happy Monday. It is July 6, 2026. I hope you had a restful weekend. Let's get you caught up on the fast-paced news defining our world this morning.
We are beginning this week under the shadow of major geopolitical shifts. Following the death of Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali

item.title: Morning Briefing — July 06, 2026
item.description:
Good morning. Today is Monday, July 6th, 2026, and I am here to bring you up to speed on the stories shaping our world this morning.
We begin with the high-stakes situation in Iran, where a national funeral is underway for Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. He was killed in U.S.–Israeli airstri
